import pytest
from source import subsequences


def test_subsequences_returns_correct_count_and_values():
    result = subsequences(a=1, b=5, k=2)
    expected = [[1, 2], [1, 3], [1, 4], [2, 3], [2, 4], [3, 4]]
    assert result == expected, (
        f"subsequences(1, 5, 2) should return {expected} (C(4,2)=6 pairs), got {result!r} — "
        "base case 'return []' yields no rest values so every level appends nothing; fix is 'return [[]]'"
    )
